description: 溫備援跨區域架構、異步複製、SD-WAN雙ISP；保障RTO ≤ 4hr/RPO ≤ 15min，DR演練納入季度Review。
description_en: Warm-standby cross-region architecture, async replication, SD-WAN dual-ISP — ensuring RTO ≤ 4hr / RPO ≤ 15min; DR drills included in quarterly reviews.
description_zh-Hans: 温备援跨区域架构、异步复制、SD-WAN双ISP；保障RTO ≤ 4hr/RPO ≤ 15min，DR演练纳入季度Review。
